title: setaria vulpina
intro: Setaria vulpina, also known as yellow foxtail, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Setaria vulpina can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams to promote skin health and soothe irritated tissues.
